user_request: Emergency rite: melta charge requires preparation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: melta charge requires preparation

### TOPIC
melta charge preparation

### COMPONENT
melta charge

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- melta charge
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the melta charge, instrument of the Omnissiah's wrath!
Congregation: We honour the melta charge in this sacred preparation!
Priest: First, examine the thermal containment matrices with reverent scrutiny.
Congregation: The melta charge shall be prepared through diligent preparation!
Priest: Second, calibrate the fuel-cell igniters to precise tolerances.
Congregation: Glory to the Machine Spirits of the melta charge!
